title: '85: The Greatest Team in Football History
original_title: '85: The Greatest Team in Football History
overview: Through never-been-seen-before footage and fascinating interviews with key members of the 1985 Chicago Bears -- Mike Ditka, Jim McMahon, Mike Singletary, and others -- you will hear the inside story of their historic season.
